hero.headline: Lelettrica
hero.subheadline: E-bike rental and repairs in Dro, Lake Garda
hero.website_wip: Our full website is under construction. In the meantime, all the information you need is below.

rental.title: Rental
rental.desc: Flyer e-bikes and classic bicycles to explore Lake Garda and the surrounding valleys.

repair.title: Repairs
repair.desc: Repair and maintenance of e-bikes, road bikes, mountain bikes, electric scooters and any type of bicycle.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: All prices include helmet and lock. Multi-bike rentals available.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.data_body: This website uses Google Analytics (GA4) only after obtaining your consent. GA4 collects anonymous browsing data (pages visited, session duration, device type). No personally identifiable data is collected directly through the website.
privacy.legal_basis_body: The processing of analytics data is based on the user's consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR), given through the cookie banner on first visit. Consent can be withdrawn at any time.
privacy.cookies_body: We use technically necessary cookies for the website to function, and — subject to consent — third-party analytics cookies (Google Analytics). You can update your preferences at any time by clicking "Cookie settings" in the footer.
privacy.retention_body: Data collected through Google Analytics is retained for 14 months, as per the default GA4 configuration.
privacy.third_parties_body: Browsing data is transmitted to Google LLC (1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA), acting as a data processor under Art. 28 GDPR. Google LLC participates in the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. More information: policies.google.com/privacy.
privacy.rights_body: Under Arts. 15–22 GDPR you have the right to: access your data, request its rectification or erasure, restrict its processing, object to processing, request data portability, and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at:
privacy.contact_body: For any requests related to data processing: info@lelettricaleoni.com
